Title: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
Actors: Vin Diesel, Donnie Yen, Deepika Padukone
Plot: Extreme athlete turned government operative Xander Cage (Vin Diesel) comes out of self-imposed exile, thought to be long dead, and is set on a collision course with deadly alpha warrior Xiang (Donnie Yen) and his team in a race to recover a sinister and seemingly unstoppable weapon known as Pandora's Box. Recruiting an all-new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself enmeshed in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of world governments.
Language: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Mandarin, Tagalog, Russian
